user_query:
I need a one-week meal prep system for one person on $50/week that’s vegetarian and gluten-free (eggs are okay). Please read my details in input/profile.json, pantry staples in input/pantry.json, and preferences in input/preferences.txt. Based on those, do the following:

1) Build a tailored weekly base template (proteins, starches, vegetables, sauces) and a 7-day plan that honors my restrictions and dislikes. Make sure starches are gluten-free and sauces use tamari (or another gluten-free option) instead of regular soy sauce. Avoid any items I dislike. Save this as output/meal_plan.json with these top-level keys:
- budget (number)
- restrictions (array)
- base_template: { proteins: [], starches: [], vegetables: [], sauces: [] }
- assembly_formula (string of the 4-part formula)
- weekly_plan (array of objects with day and 2-3 meal ideas each)

2) Create a shopping list that excludes anything already on hand in input/pantry.json. Use gluten-free items where applicable (e.g., rice, potatoes, quinoa, GF-certified oats, rice pasta) and include tamari (or coconut aminos) for a ginger-soy style sauce. Do not include any mushrooms or other disliked items. Save as output/shopping_list.csv with columns: item,category,unit,quantity,estimated_cost,notes. Keep the total between $40 and $60.

3) Provide a budget breakdown JSON that adds up the categories to the same total as the shopping list (within ~$1). Categories should be: proteins, starches, vegetables, pantry_flavor, total. Save as output/budget_breakdown.json.

4) Write a Sunday prep schedule with a 2–2.5 hour sequence that uses parallel cooking, includes grains, oven proteins (vegetarian), roasted vegetables, one sauce, a stew/soup, portioning, and explicitly includes food safety: cool from 140F to 40F within 2 hours, use shallow containers, and ice bath guidance for large batches. Save as output/prep_schedule.md.

5) Write a storage & zero-waste guide that includes fridge and freezer shelf-life guidance (e.g., cooked rice 4–5 days; beans/lentils 4–5 days; soups/stews 4–5 days; freezer durations around 3 months for grains/beans/soups), FIFO labeling, and reminders to label containers with dates. Save as output/storage_guide.md.

Constraints:
- Respect vegetarian + gluten-free in all items. Eggs are fine.
- No mushrooms (see preferences file).
- Do not list pantry items that are marked on hand in input/pantry.json.
- Use tamari or coconut aminos instead of regular soy sauce.
- The assembly formula should be the 4-part scoop formula from your system.

Deliver all files only under output/ as specified above, and ensure the total estimated shopping cost stays between $40 and $60.
